changeSet.author: content
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE character_class ADD COLUMN hit_die INT, ADD COLUMN is_spellcaster BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, ADD COLUMN has_cantrips BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, ADD COLUMN is_half_caster BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, ADD COLUMN spellcasting_ability_id uuid REFERENCES ability_score(ability_score_id), ADD COLUMN skill_choice_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, ADD COLUMN skill_choice_any BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, ADD COLUMN armor_proficiency_text TEXT, ADD COLUMN weapon_proficiency_text TEXT, ADD COLUMN tool_proficiency_text TEXT;

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE character_class DROP COLUMN hit_die, DROP COLUMN is_spellcaster, DROP COLUMN has_cantrips, DROP COLUMN is_half_caster, DROP COLUMN spellcasting_ability_id, DROP COLUMN skill_choice_count, DROP COLUMN skill_choice_any, DROP COLUMN armor_proficiency_text, DROP COLUMN weapon_proficiency_text, DROP COLUMN tool_proficiency_text;

changeSet.author: content
